23: Please be advised that <SheetEn(Item,3,24122,2,1)/> can only be obtained via the Mark II crystal forge located in <Sheet(ContentFinderCondition,IntegerParameter(1),42)/>, and that crystal forges located elsewhere will not yield this material.
